message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "risk_area": "data_protection",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Retention of Company data indefinitely",
      "rationale": "The Developer's ability to retain Company data indefinitely poses significant risks related to data privacy and compliance with data protection regulations.",
      "mitigation": "Negotiate a clause that requires the Developer to return or securely destroy all Company data upon termination of the Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "data_protection",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Delayed notification of Data Breach",
      "rationale": "A 45-day notification period for a Data Breach could lead to significant reputational damage and regulatory penalties for the Company.",
      "mitigation": "Shorten the notification period to within 24 hours of the Developer becoming aware of a Data Breach.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "operational",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Undefined requirements for custom software",
      "rationale": "The lack of clearly defined requirements for the custom software development can lead to scope creep, project delays, and increased costs.",
      "mitigation": "Establish a detailed requirements-gathering process with clear milestones and deliverables before commencing development.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "commercial",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Ambiguity in the definition of 'Services'",
      "rationale": "The broad definition of 'Services' may lead to misunderstandings regarding the scope of work and potential disputes over deliverables.",
      "mitigation": "Clarify and specify the services to be provided in the Agreement to avoid ambiguity.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "enforcement",
      "severity": "low",
      "issue": "Approval discretion of Company",
      "rationale": "The sole discretion of the Company to approve specifications may lead to delays and potential conflicts if expectations are not aligned.",
      "mitigation": "Implement a collaborative review process for specifications to ensure alignment and timely approvals.",
      "confidence": 0.65
    }
  ]
}
